history.text: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
The image displays a mobile application interface. The primary content is a pop-up message box with the title "Ada masalah saat memuat iklan" (There is a problem loading the ad). Below the title, it says "Harap periksa koneksi internet Anda dan coba lagi." (Please check your internet connection and try again.). There is an "OK" button to dismiss the message.

The background shows a project management or editing interface with options like "Proyek" (Project), "Template Anda" (Your Template), "Elemen" (Elements), and "Cloud". It also lists project names and dates, along with "Fitur Khusus Anggota" (Special Member Features) and options for "Opsi Keanggotaan" (Membership Options) and "Ekspor Gratis" (Free Export).

There is no nudity, pornography, or suggestive content present in the image. Therefore, the content is safe.
